name: Katie Brown
note: Guest Player: 3P Sports 2nd Annual Double Play Derby
quote: Katie brings guest-player energy, confidence, and a ready-to-compete mindset every time she joins the group.
characterBullets: Ready to compete: steps into the lineup with confidence and purpose.
Team-first approach: fits into the dugout rhythm and supports the group.
High-effort athlete: brings focus, hustle, and positive energy.

Team energy: plays hard and helps create momentum for the group.
